hero.subtitle: Let Blue Fox AI trading robots grow your capital. Deposit, rent a robot, and earn a monthly return paid to your wallet — withdraw anytime in crypto, bank transfer or cash.

deposit.title: Deposit funds

deposit.referenceHint: Always include your transaction reference so we can match your payment quickly.

withdraw.title: Withdraw funds
withdraw.pendingHelp: Your documents are being reviewed. Withdrawals unlock once you're approved (usually 24–48h).
withdraw.verifyHelp: To protect your funds, withdrawals require a verified identity. It only takes a minute.
withdraw.bankPlaceholder: Account name, number, IBAN/IFSC, bank name
withdraw.cashPlaceholder: City / area for cash pickup + your contact number
withdraw.formSubtitle: Funds are held as soon as you request, then released once our team approves.
withdraw.successMessage: Withdrawal requested! It is now pending approval.

invest.title: Rent a robot
invest.subtitle: Pick a package — the deposit is locked into the contract and pays a fixed monthly return.
invest.emptyWallet: Your wallet is empty. Add funds first, then rent a robot.
invest.highestPackagePrefix: Your highest package so far is
invest.highestPackageSuffix: You can only rent a higher package — the same or lower ones aren't available.

kyc.subtitle: Verify once to enable withdrawals from your wallet.
kyc.hubMsg_none: Verify your identity to unlock withdrawals.

kyc.hubMsg_approved: Your identity is verified. Withdrawals are enabled.
kyc.hubMsg_rejected: Your submission was not approved. Please review the reason and re-submit.

kyc.reviewWithinHours: We'll review your verification, usually within 24–48 hours.
kyc.uploadIdAndSelfie: Upload a government ID and a selfie. Required to enable withdrawals.
kyc.privacyNote: Your documents are stored securely and only used to verify your identity.
kyc.consentLabel: I confirm these documents are mine and the details are accurate.

about.whatWeDo1Text: Sophisticated, continuously-refined algorithms analyze the markets and execute with speed and precision.
about.whatWeDo2Text: The robots monitor conditions and trade around the clock — no manual intervention required.
about.whatWeDo3Text: Advanced trading technology for investors of all levels — not just experts or institutions.
about.whatWeDo4Text: You allocate funds; the robots operate autonomously. We don't manage discretionary money.
about.heroBadge: About Blue Fox AI Tech Solutions
about.heroSubtitle: Welcome to Blue Fox AI Tech Solutions, where we are transforming the future of trading through advanced AI-powered trading robots.
about.whoWeAreP1Part1: We are not a traditional trading platform. Instead, we provide investors with access to
about.whoWeAreP2: These intelligent systems are designed with sophisticated algorithms capable of analyzing market conditions, executing trades, and making data-driven decisions aimed at maximizing investment growth — all without requiring constant user involvement.
about.missionCardText: To make advanced AI-driven trading technology accessible to investors through a simple, user-friendly platform.
about.visionCardText: To democratize access to advanced automated trading for investors of all experience levels, worldwide.
about.value1Text: Cutting-edge AI and automated trading technology, always improving.
about.value2Text: Clear terms — you stay in control of your funds and decisions.
about.value3Text: Designed for investors worldwide, whatever their experience level.
about.value4Text: Intelligent systems working for you 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
about.ctaText: Join Blue Fox and put cutting-edge AI trading robots to work on your capital — 24/7.

mission.heroLead: Our mission is to make advanced AI-driven trading technology accessible to investors through a user-friendly AI Trading Bots platform.
mission.intro1: We provide access to autonomous AI-powered trading robots designed to analyze market data, identify trading opportunities, and execute trades around the clock. Using sophisticated algorithms and automated decision-making, these systems continuously monitor market conditions and adapt their strategies to pursue optimal performance.
mission.intro2a: By leveraging cutting-edge artificial intelligence and automated trading technology,
mission.intro2b: aims to simplify participation in financial markets and provide investors with access to intelligent, data-driven trading solutions operating 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
mission.roleLead: Our role is to provide the technology platform that enables clients to allocate funds to these AI trading solutions.
mission.roleTextB: provide discretionary investment management services. Instead, investors choose to participate in AI-driven trading strategies through our platform, while the trading robots operate autonomously according to their programmed algorithms.
mission.deliverSubtitle: The mission comes to life through the way our technology is built and operated.
mission.pillar1Text: A simple, user-friendly platform that removes the complexity of trading so anyone can participate.
mission.pillar2Text: AI-powered trading robots that analyze market data, identify opportunities and execute trades on their own.
mission.pillar3Text: Systems that continuously monitor markets and operate 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
mission.pillar4Text: Sophisticated algorithms that adapt their approach to changing market conditions in pursuit of optimal performance.
mission.investorsTitle: What our mission means for you
mission.benefit1Text: Every decision is based on data and algorithms — never fear, greed or guesswork.
mission.benefit2Text: You choose your package and allocate funds. We provide the technology; we don't manage discretionary money.
mission.benefit3Text: No charts to watch and no manual trading — the robots work while you go about your day.
mission.ctaTitle: Ready to put the mission to work?
mission.ctaText: Explore our packages or read the vision driving everything we do.

vision.heroLead: Our vision is to democratize access to advanced automated trading technology by enabling investors of all experience levels to participate in AI-driven investment solutions.
vision.intro1: We believe that intelligent trading should not be limited to financial experts or large institutions. By providing access to sophisticated AI-powered trading robots, we aim to remove traditional barriers and make advanced trading technology available to everyone.
vision.intro2: Our AI trading robots are developed using advanced algorithms and continuously refined through rigorous testing and real-market analysis. These systems autonomously monitor market conditions, identify opportunities, and execute trading strategies with speed and precision.
vision.intro3: We envision a future where investors can confidently harness the power of artificial intelligence to participate in financial markets without the complexity of manual trading. Through innovation, transparency, and automation, we strive to create a platform where technology works continuously on behalf of investors.
vision.barriersSubtitle: The traditional barriers to advanced trading — expertise, complexity and access — are exactly what we set out to remove.
vision.barrier1Text: Intelligent trading should not be limited to financial experts or large institutions — we open it to everyone.
vision.barrier2Text: We remove the technical barriers of manual trading so you can participate without becoming an expert.
vision.barrier3Text: We aim to make advanced trading technology available to investors around the world.
vision.future1Text: Robots built on advanced algorithms and continuously refined through rigorous testing and real-market analysis.
vision.future2Text: Clear terms and an honest platform where you always understand how the technology works on your behalf.
vision.future3Text: Technology that works continuously for you — identifying opportunities and executing with speed and precision.
vision.future4Text: A future where investors can confidently harness AI to take part in financial markets, 24/7.
vision.commitmentText: To empower individuals with cutting-edge AI technology — making automated trading more accessible, efficient, and convenient for investors worldwide.
vision.ctaTitle: Be part of the future of trading
vision.ctaText: Start with a package today, or read the mission behind our work.

services.heroLead: From your first deposit to your monthly withdrawal, everything is managed from one simple platform. You choose a package — our robots do the trading.
services.offerSubtitle: We provide the technology platform; the robots operate autonomously. You stay in control of your funds and decisions.
services.offering1Text: Autonomous Expert-Advisor robots that analyze the markets and trade 24/7 — no manual work for you.
services.offering2Text: Each package pays a fixed monthly ROI credited straight to your wallet throughout the contract.
services.offering3Text: Fund in crypto or bank, and withdraw in crypto, bank or cash — reviewed and processed by our team.
services.howTitle: From sign-up to monthly income in 4 steps
services.howSubtitleSuffix: registration fee, then deposit and start earning — all from your client portal.
services.packagesSubtitle: Pick the tier that matches your budget and timeline. Capital is returned in 3 parts over the 3 months after your term.
services.fundingText: Top up your wallet by crypto or bank transfer. When you want to cash out, request a withdrawal in crypto, bank or cash — our team reviews and processes every request securely.
services.ctaText: Register in minutes, deposit, and let a Blue Fox robot trade for you 24/7.

contact.heroSubtitleBefore: Questions about our AI trading robots, packages, deposits or withdrawals? Our team in
contact.formIntro: Fill in the form and we'll reply within 24 hours.
contact.privacyNote: By submitting, you agree to our Privacy Policy. We never share your details.
contact.successBody: — our team will get back to you within 24 hours. For anything urgent, message us on WhatsApp.
